title: Trait Definitions
description: Defines pawn traits that modify skills or trigger custom gameplay effects. A pawn can have multiple traits assigned at creation or gained during play.

name_key.description: i18n key for the display name shown on the pawn's trait list.

skill_modifiers.description: Adjustments this trait applies to a pawn's effective skill levels.

custom_effects.description: Scripted effects that don't fit the modifier system. Each entry names a handler function and passes arbitrary parameters to it.

ModifierOp.description: How the modifier value is applied. "Flat" adds a fixed amount. "Factor" multiplies by the value.

SkillModifier.description: A modifier applied to a specific skill.

skill.description: The skill ID this modifier targets.

op.description: Whether this modifier adds a flat bonus or multiplies.

value.description: The modifier amount. For Flat, added directly. For Factor, used as a multiplier (e.g. 1.2 = +20%).

CustomEffect.description: A scripted effect with a named handler and free-form parameters.

handler.description: Name of the effect handler function that processes this effect.

params.description: Arbitrary key-value parameters passed to the handler. Structure depends on the handler.
